persona.name: Sarah Chen
persona.description: 32-year-old Korean-American woman with shoulder-length black hair.

productionWork.description: Production photo: Elaborate Elizabethan court costumes for Hamlet, rich burgundy and gold brocade, multiple actors in period dress on a professional theatre stage, dramatic theatrical lighting

Dynamic dress rehearsal: actors in full period costume mid-performance on a professional stage, high-quality production photography
